description_long: This is a compact, single-story bungalow with a modern, minimalist design. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large black panels on one side, likely representing windows or sliding doors. The interior layout is open, featuring a living area, kitchen, bedroom, and bathroom, all visible through the cutaway design. The flooring varies between rooms, with some areas showing tiled surfaces and others a lighter, possibly wooden or laminate finish. The roof is flat, and there is no visible porch or veranda. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with large openings on one side and smaller or fewer windows on the others.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white exterior walls, and large black window panels. The interior is open-plan with distinct living, kitchen, and bedroom areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, a large living area, and a glimpse of the kitchen and bedroom.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bathroom with dark tiles and a secondary entrance or utility area.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by large black panels, likely windows or sliding doors, and a partial view of the living space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bedroom, dining area, and a more enclosed section of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large side window panels
